prerequisites.value: Str 15; Wis 13; Perfect Style; base attack bonus +9 or monk level 9th.

description.value: **Benefit:** When using Perfect Style, your attacks ignore an amount of hardness equal to your character level. Additionally, you gain a +4 bonus on Strength checks to break objects. If you spend 1 ki point as a swift action, you also gain the benefits of Improved Sunder for 1 round.
